docs.title: Welcome to Boris AI Documentation
docs.text:
Project in Development

This is the official documentation for Boris AI.

docs.title: 🚀 What is Boris AI?
docs.text: Boris AI is an AI agent designed to run models and LLMs locally. It communicates directly with the models via text messages without using HTTP. By relying on direct C++ libraries, it eliminates network overhead, allowing you to run heavier models with high agility and performance.

docs.title: 📋 Key Features
docs.text:
• Local Execution: Run powerful LLMs entirely on your local machine with zero network latency.
  • Direct C++ Integration: Eliminates HTTP overhead by communicating directly with models using C++ libraries.
  • High Performance: Optimized architecture allows running heavier models smoothly.
  • Privacy First: Everything runs locally, ensuring complete data privacy.

docs.title: 🛠️ Quick Start
docs.text:
First Steps

If this is your first time using Boris AI, we recommend starting with our Installation Guide.

docs.title: 🧪 Tested Models
docs.text:
Boris AI has been tested and is compatible with the following models:

Model Name Quantization Format DeepSeek Coder 1.3B Kexer Q6_K GGUF DeepSeek Coder V2 Lite Instruct Q4_K_M GGUF Gemma 4 E4b IT Q4_K_M GGUF GLM 4.6V Flash Q4_K_M GGUF GPT OSS 20B Q4_K_M GGUF Meta Llama 3.1 8B Instruct Q4_K_M GGUF Ministral 3 14B Reasoning Q4_K_M GGUF Mistral 7B Instruct v0.3 Q4_K_M GGUF Qwen2.5 Coder 1.5B Instruct Q4_K_M GGUF Qwen2.5 Coder 7B Instruct Q4_K_M GGUF

First Steps

  • Quick Guide - How to run Boris AI

Last Updated

This documentation is continuously updated. The latest version was built on {{ git_build_date }}.

docs.title: Quick Guide
docs.text: This guide will help you get started with Boris AI. Boris AI is a simple application that requires no technical configuration or complex installation.

docs.title: Prerequisites
docs.text: • Java 21: You need to have Java 21 or higher installed on your computer.

docs.title: How to Run Boris AI
docs.text:
1. Download the application file, which is in .jar format (e.g., boris-ai-1.0.0.jar).
  2. Open your terminal or command prompt (Command Prompt or PowerShell on Windows, Terminal on macOS/Linux).
  3. Navigate to the folder where you downloaded the file.
  4. Run the following command:

bash java -jar boris-ai-1.0.0.jar

(Note: Make sure to replace boris-ai-1.0.0.jar with the exact name of the file you downloaded).

Once this command is executed, the Boris AI graphical interface will open automatically, and you can start interacting with the application.

docs.title: Error: "Java is not recognized as an internal or external command"
docs.text:
This means you don't have Java installed, or it's not configured correctly on your system. Make sure you install Java 21+.

You can check if you have Java installed by typing this command in your console: bash java -version
